name: Necrophos
description: Behold the Pope of Pestilence. Rotund'jere, the Necrophos Necrophos rehabilitate himself upon arriving to the location. Then, the affected enemy unit spreads a wave of Death Pulse corresponding of its level, dealing damage to enemy units and healing allied units.

abilities.name: Sadist
abilities.description: Creep kills and denies grant a less effective stack.

abilities.name: Death Pulse
abilities.description: Releases a wave of death around Necrophos, dealing damage to enemy units and healing allied units.

abilities.name: Ghost Shroud
abilities.description: Turns Necrophos ethereal, and emits a movement speed slow aura that affects enemy units around him. Reduces Necrophos' magic resistance while turning ethereal. However, his health-related and mana-related restorative powers are all amplified.

abilities.name: Heartstopper Aura
abilities.description: Grants bonus enemy max health loss per second based on Necrophos' actual current health regeneration values.

abilities.name: Death Seeker
abilities.description: Launches two simultaneously to both targets, Necrophos reappears next to the secondary target.

abilities.name: Reaper's Scythe
abilities.description: Stuns the unit-targeted enemy hero, then deals damage based on per point of missing health of the affected unit. Any kills under this effect is credited to Necrophos. The amount of death and suffering in the air increases the power of Necrophos's plague magic.
